name: Update Tile Entity
desc: Updates a tile entity's NBT data (chest inventory, furnace items, beacon, etc).

fields.name: action
fields.desc: Action ID (1=refresh mob spawner, 2=chest open count, 3=beacon, 4=skull, 5=flower pot, 9=sign data)

notes: Action 9 is used for updating sign text (shown to the player), especially when signs are loaded from disk.

implementation.overview: Updates tile entity NBT. Modules: ChestESP, SpawnerFinder.
